name: Portuguese Eggs with Peas
recipeIngredient: 1/4 pound garlic-seasoned pork sausage, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy 10-inch skillet, melt the butter over moderate heat.
2. When the foam has almost subsided, add the onions and stir frequently until golden (8-10 minutes).
3. Pour in the stock, peas, parsley, coriander, sugar, salt, pepper, and arrange sausage slices around the pan edge in a circle.
4. Bring to a boil over high heat, then reduce to low, cover, and simmer for five minutes.
5. Break eggs into the skillet, keeping them well apart. Lightly sprinkle with salt and pepper.
6. Cover and cook for three or four minutes until egg whites are set. Serve immediately.
